Persistence._comment: Replay-guard state store. 'InMemory' (default) for local dev/tests. Switch to 'SqlServer'/'Npgsql' in Program.cs once a real DBMS is wired up (also requires a connection string and EF Core migrations).

KeyService._comment: Placeholder master-key lookup service contract: GET {BaseUrl}/tags/{uid}/key -> { masterKeyBase64 }. Adjust HttpTagKeyProvider once the real contract is known. Do NOT point this at a service without transport security in production.
